install:
cd af_final && npm install && { [ -f .env ] || printf 'VITE_SUPABASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:54321
VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZS1kZW1vIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJleHAiOjE5ODM4MTI5OTZ9.CRXP1A7WOeoJeXxjNni43kdQwgnWNReilDMblYTn_I0
VITE_APP_NAME=Assistente Financeiro
' > .env; }
start: sudo sh -c 'pgrep -x dockerd >/dev/null 2>&1 || nohup dockerd >/tmp/dockerd.log 2>&1 &'; for i in $(seq 1 60); do sudo docker info >/dev/null 2>&1 && break; sleep 1; done; sudo chmod 666 /var/run/docker.sock; cd af_final && supabase start
